chunks.title: Oracle concerning the Wilderness of the Sea
chunks.reason: A unified prophetic oracle regarding Babylon's fall, including the prophet's reaction and the lookout's report.

chunks.title: Oracle concerning Dumah
chunks.reason: A distinct oracle addressing Seir and the watchman's response regarding the night.

chunks.title: Oracle concerning Arabia
chunks.reason: A unified oracle addressing the caravans of Dedan and the judgment on Kedar.
